card.name: Blade of Regrowth
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent. Return up to one target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Underfolk Scavenger
card.text: When Underfolk Scavenger enters, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Belowborn Lullaby
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand then shuffle. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Rotbound Paladin
card.text: Vigilance When Rotbound Paladin enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tomb Titan
card.text: Vigilance, trample Whenever Tomb Titan enters or attacks, create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type.

card.name: Covenant Recruiters
card.text: When Covenant Recruiters enters, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand. If you don't, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Demon Tamer Morveth
card.text: When Demon Tamer Morveth enters, create Kraghul, a legendary red Demon creature token with "Kraghul's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control." Whenever you would put a land card from your library or graveyard into your hand, put it onto the battlefield tapped instead.

card.name: Ruinsworn Knight
card.text: When Ruinsworn Knight dies, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Ember Rose Pyromancer
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a 1/1 blue and red Elemental creature token with prowess.

card.name: Devoted Knight
card.text: Knights you control get +1/+1 and have ward {1}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

card.name: Grimwoods Hag
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, draw a card, then discard a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Crimson Lily Elite
card.text: Whenever another creature or artifact you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Blasphemy — {2}{B}{R}: Create two Treasure tokens. (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Ridgefang Ravager
card.text: Feral 3 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 3 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) Trample Whenever you put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Guild's Monster Hunter's
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Guild's Monster Hunter's.

card.name: Wayfinder's Curiosity
card.text: Creature spells you control can't be countered. Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Eternal Congregants
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Infusion — Eternal Congregants has menace as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: Boasting Commander
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast a spell that targets a creature you control, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Waychime Troubadour
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. At the beginning of your upkeep, Waychime Troubadour explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Rite of the Second Oath
card.text: Return all creature cards with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Big Game Hunt
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature an opponent controls. Create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Kraghul VTK
card.text: Kraghul's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.

card.name: Elemental VTK
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Old God's Call
card.text: Choose one — • You gain 5 life. • Create X 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens, where x is the amount of life you gained this turn. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Radiant Charge
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. If you cast this card from exile, that creature gains trample instead. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Escaping the Dungeon
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Blasphemous Lightning
card.text: Blasphemous Lightning deals 1 damage to you and 2 damage any other target. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Demand Answers
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Fatal Encounter
card.text: Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less. Destroy that creature if it has mana value 4 or less instead if a card left your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Prayer of Rebirth
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Search your library for a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Elyndor Dragonrider
card.text: Flying When Elyndor Dragonrider enters, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Elyndor Lookout
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink

card.name: Oathbreak
card.text: Target tapped creature deals damage to itself equal to its power.

card.name: Bones as Bearings
card.text: Enchant creature or Map Enchanted creature loses all abilities and becomes a colorless artifact Map with: "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as sorcery." (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Siege on the Capital
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Elyndor or Khar-Duun. • Elyndor — Exile target creature or planeswalker until Siege on the Capital leaves the battlefield. • Khar-Duun — Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Elyndor Footknight
card.text: Vigilance Valiant — Whenever Elyndor Footknight becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Siege on the North Front
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Elyndor or Khar-Duun. • Elyndor — Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. • Khar-Duun — Creatures you control have flying.

card.name: Siege on the South Front
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Elyndor or Khar-Duun. • Elyndor — At the beginning of your end step, each opponent discards a card. • Khar-Duun — Creatures you control have menace.

card.name: Siege on the East Front
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Elyndor or Khar-Duun. • Elyndor — At the beginning of your upkeep you may discard up to two cards, if you do draw that many cards. • Khar-Duun — Creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Siege on the West Front
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Elyndor or Khar-Duun. • Elyndor — Whenever you cast a creature spell, draw a card. • Khar-Duun — Creatures you control have base power and toughness equal to the half the number of lands you control rounded up.

card.name: Descent of the Radiant
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Firebound Oath
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains first strike until end of turn. Incantation 2 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 2 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Tomb Spirit
card.text: Flying, vigilance Infusion — When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it if you gained life this turn.

card.name: Canyonline Explorer
card.text: When Canyonline Explorer enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures you control.

card.name: Depthward Delver
card.text: Lifelink When Depthward Delver dies, draw a card.

card.name: Aftermath Templar
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more other creatures you control die, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Concord Cavalry
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Concord Cavalry becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, scry 1.

card.name: Incantation of Sacred Flame
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Scry 1. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: The Clattercrew
card.text: As long as The Clattercrew isn't on the battlefield, it's a 1/1 Skeleton creature in addition to its other types. [+1]: Mill a card. Create a Map token. [-3]: Destroy target nonland permanent. [-7]: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your end step, create three 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. Then each creature you control explores."

card.name: Wayfinder's Cloak
Courageous Charge
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes a target of a spell or ability you control, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Fallen Champion
card.text: Flying When Fallen Champion enters, if it entered from a graveyard, put a vigilance and two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Light Unyielding
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each nonland permanent you control with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Embertail Depthwarden
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Dungeon Shackler
card.text: When Dungeon Shackler enters, exile up to one target creature an opponent controls until Dungeon Shackler leaves the battlefield. If that creature has power 2 or less, put a shield counter on Dungeon Shackler. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Wingborne Knights
card.text: Flying When Wingborne Knights enters, create two 1/1 white Human Knight creature tokens.

card.name: Highblade Justicar
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Highblade Justicar becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Black Reliquary Champion
card.text: First strike, vigilance Whenever Black Reliquary Champion enters or attacks, you may return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Liturgical Ignition
card.text: Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control. Incantation 2 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 2 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Graveside Lament
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Exile target player's graveyard. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Holy Smite
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Cliffpath Wayfarer
card.text: When Cliffpath Wayfarer dies, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Arvek, Sword of the Church
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Arvek becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on him. When Arvek dies, if he had power 4 or greater, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: From Depths Reborn
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Valenor, Bow of the Church
card.text: First strike At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. At the beginning of your end step, remove a counter from a permanent you control or a card you own in exile.

card.name: Lunapollen Dancer
card.text: Flash Flying When Lunapollen Dancer enters, tap up to one target creature. Whenever Lunapollen Dancer deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a stun counter on target tapped creature.

card.name: Guild's Confiscator
card.text: Flash Vigilance, lifelink If one or more tokens would be created under opponents control, a Map token is created instead. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Bad Omen
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, each opponent losses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Crowcleaver Reaper
card.text: {3}{B}, Exile Crowcleaver Reaper from your graveyard: Each opponent discards a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Veiled Corpsecaller
card.text: Morbid — When this creature enters, if a creature died this turn, draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Depth's Edict
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature. Any number of target players each mill two cards.

card.name: Pact to the Old Gods
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if one or more cards left your graveyard this turn. Surveil 2. You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: Skullfeather Harrier
card.text: Flying Whenever Skullfeather Harrier attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, surveil 1 then draw a card.

card.name: Gravebloom Bug
card.text: When Gravebloom Bug dies, put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Reliquary Excision
card.text: As additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact or a creature. If you do this spell costs {2} less to cast. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Blightwing
card.text: Flying When Blightwing enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Defy the Depths
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Exposed to the Void
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. • Target creature gets +0/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Grimwoods Cutthroat
card.text: Lifelink When Grimwoods Cutthroat enters, target player mills two cards.

card.name: Ball of Rats
card.text: When Ball of Rats dies, return target creature card with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Gilded Reanimation
card.text: Return any number of target creature cards with total mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Enraged Bat
card.text: Flying, lifelink Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Rat Hurl
card.text: Rat Hurl deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Create a number of 1/1 black Rat creature tokens with "This token can't block." equal to the excess damage dealt.

card.name: Witches' Sabbath
card.text: Mill five cards. You may put up to three cards from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Graveyard Golem
card.text: Graveyard Golem's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard. Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, mill three cards.

card.name: Offering Nibbler
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Offering Nibbler.

card.name: Walking Ossuary
card.text: Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, you may return target creature card that was not put into your graveyard this turn, from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Sacrificial Cultist
card.text: Blasphemy — {3}{B}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery. (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Cursed Dunegon Scroll
card.text: Flash When Cursed Dunegon Scroll enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -3/-3 until end of turn. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Witchcourt Enforcer
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, you lose 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Corrupted Smite
card.text: Target player sacrifices a creature, discards a card and loses 3 life.

card.name: Opportunistic Dungeoneer
card.text: Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Opportunistic Dungeoneer explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Zombie Hyena
card.text: Menace Morbid — When Zombie Hyena enters, if a creature died this turn, it gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Seraphine, King's Blade
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever Seraphine enters or attacks, put two oath counters on it. Then each opponent sacrifices creatures and discards cards until the total mana value of creatures they sacrificed this way and cards they discarded way is X or greater, where X is the number of oath counters on Seraphine.

card.name: Litany of Return
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. You lose 2 life. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Grog, the Creative
card.text: Prowess Whenever Grog attacks, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery card with mana value less than or equal to Grog's power. Exile it. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled if you've have cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Voyage Through the Depths
card.text: Return up to three target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Netherwood Beast
card.text: Deathtouch, haste Ward—Exile three cards from your graveyard. Netherwood Beast can't be blocked by one creature. Whenever Netherwood Beast deals combat damage to an opponent, it deals that much damage to target planeswalker that player controls.

card.name: Odile's Oathkeeper
card.text: Other Knights you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance.

card.name: Sylvan Prayer
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Nina, Spore-Sheltered
card.text: Nina can't be countered. Vigilance Whenever a creature you control or a creature spell you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, put a +1/+1 counter on Nina then draw a card.

card.name: Song of Steel
card.text: Target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Luminous Concord Cleric
card.text: Other creatures you control get +1/+0. Other Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Rotbound Pursuer
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Rotbound Pursuer attacks, you may mill three cards. Blasphemy — {1}{B}{B}: Until end of turn, you may play lands and cast spells from your graveyard. If a card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn, exile that card instead.

card.name: Linnet, Depths Delver
card.text: Linnet can't be blocked Whenever Linnet deals combat damage to an opponent, you draw a card, then discard a card. From the depths — At the beginning of each end step, if there are ten or more cards in your graveyard, untap Linnet and transform it. --- (Back): Linnet, Depths Specter

card.name: Linnet, Depths Specter
card.text: Linnet can't be blocked. Whenever Linnet deals combat damage to an opponent, you draw a card, then you may pay {B}. If you do each opponent discards a card. --- (Front): Linnet, Depths Delver

card.name: Melia, Gentle Caretaker
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. From the depths — At the beginning of each end step, if there are ten or more cards in your graveyard, untap Melia and transform it. --- (Back): Melia, Drowned in Grief

card.name: Melia, Drowned in Grief
card.text: Deathtouch {T}: Add {B} for each creature card in your graveyard. --- (Front): Melia, Gentle Caretaker

card.name: Hagar, the Ruthless
card.text: Menace Whenever Hagar attacks, you may discard a card. When you do, draw a card. From the depths — At the beginning of each end step, if there are ten or more cards in your graveyard, untap Hagar and transform it. --- (Back): Hagar, the Broken

card.name: Hagar, the Broken
card.text: Menace Whenever you discard a card, exile it. During your turn, you may cast a spell exiled with this creature by paying 3 life in addition to paying that spell's other costs. --- (Front): Hagar, the Ruthless

card.name: Bellis, Steward of Offerings
card.text: Lifelink {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Surveil 1. From the depths — At the beginning of each end step, if there are ten or more cards in your graveyard, untap Bellis and transform her. --- (Back): Bellis, Unhallowed Shepherd

card.name: Bellis, Unhallowed Shepherd
card.text: Lifelink {1}, {T}: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a lifelink and a finality counter. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Bellis, Steward of Offerings

card.name: Crystal Cave Stasis
card.text: Enchant creature When Crystal Cave Stasis enters, tap enchanted creature and create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.") Enchanted creature can't become untapped.

card.name: Skylore Aerie-Mage
card.text: Flying When Skylore Aerie-Mage enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Duskscout Sprite
card.text: Flying When Duskscout Sprite enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Falling-Leaf Arcanist
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, Falling-Leaf Arcanist gets +2/+0 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Incantation of Repulsion
card.text: Return target creature an opponent control's to its owners hand. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Misthall Savant
card.text: Vigilance When Misthall Savant dies, up to one target creature you control explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Cliffward Apex
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Lumenhex Witch
card.text: Whenever Lumenhex Witch attacks, up to two target players each mill a card.

card.name: Incantation of Insight
card.text: Draw two cards. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Refute
card.text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Coven-Stitched Horror
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, Coven-Stitched Horror gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Arcane Murmur
card.text: Draw a card. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Elemental Incantation
card.text: Create a 1/1 blue and red Elemental creature token with prowess. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Desperate Spark
card.text: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Witch of the Ember Rose
card.text: Prowess Whenever Witch of the Ember Rose attacks, you may exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard with mana value equal to or less than its power. You may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Veilwing Harpy
card.text: Flash Flying When Veilwing Harpy enters, another target creature or artifact you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Sphinx of New Horizons
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Sphinx of New Horizons deals combat damage to a player, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Sphinx Prayer
card.text: Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Crustacean Curse
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a blue crab with base power and toughness 0/3.

card.name: Incantation of Duplication
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Spellcurrent Jellymage
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Arcane Smite
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Create a token copy of target creature with mana value 2 or less. Draw a card.

card.name: Academy Mentor
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, draw a card.

card.name: Croak-Hag Warlock
card.text: When Croak-Hag Warlock enters, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard.

card.name: Nightcap Hexer
card.text: Flying Whenever Nightcap Hexer deals combat damage to a player, if it has no counters, put a prowess counter on it.

card.name: Chart a Course
card.text: Draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you attacked this turn.

card.name: Canticle of Frost
card.text: The owner of target spell or creature puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Tidecall Temptress
card.text: Flash When Tidecall Temptress enters, counter target activated or triggered ability of a nonland source. If an ability of a creature is countered this way, tap that creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Luminous Ceremony
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an instant card or creature card with flash.

card.name: Pathfinder Relic
card.text: Flash When Pathfinder Relic enters, draw a card. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Bloodaxe Berserker
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Trailreading Adept
card.text: Menace, haste

card.name: Path of the Reaping
card.text: Path of the Reaping deals 5 damage to target creature. Create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Bloodmask Zealot
card.text: Ward—Pay 2 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 2 life.) Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Heir of the High Pass
card.text: When Heir of the High Pass enters, choose one: • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") • Create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Curious Appraiser
card.text: Blasphemy — {3}{R}: Discard a card. Draw two cards. (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Ironclad Guard
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Ironclad Guard becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Scrapstick Skulker
card.text: Haste When Scrapstick Skulker dies, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Scorching Dragonfire
card.text: Scorching Dragonfire deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Crimson Petal Knight
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Crimson Petal Knight becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, target creature can't block until end of turn.

card.name: Demolition Expert
card.text: When Demolition Expert enters, destroy target artifact or nonbasic land. Its controller searches their library for a basic land card, puts it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffles.

card.name: Savage Interruption
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Rootwarden Minotaur
card.text: Trample Whenever you reveal a creature card, while exploring, you may put it into your hand. At the beginning of your upkeep Rootwarden Minotaur explores.

card.name: Shielded Resolve
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Flockcaller Guildmage
card.text: Whenever Flockcaller Guildmage explores, create a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Luminous High Justicar
card.text: Flash Vigilance Whenever a nontoken creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Antiquity Salvager
card.text: {R}, {T}: Discard a card, then draw a card. {R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Blinding Rebuff
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Manasiphon Witch
card.text: Flying Whenever Manasiphon Witch deals combat damage to a player, exile target instant or sorcery card from their graveyard. You may cast it this turn, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Cult Father
card.text: Whenever you discard a card or sacrifice an artifact, Cult Father deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Hired Monster Hunter
card.text: Menace Whenever Hired Monster Hunter attacks, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Valkor, Cult-Called Harrier
card.text: First strike, haste Whenever Valkor attacks, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card with mana value 2 or less and exile it. You may cast that card by discarding a card rather than paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Living Reliquary
card.text: Defender When Living Reliquary enters, draw a card.

card.name: Restorative Current
card.text: Target creature has base power and toughness 3/3 until end of turn. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Guiding Emberlantern
card.text: Flash When Guiding Emberlantern enters, it deals 1 damage to each creature your opponents control. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Armored Boar
card.text: Feral 2 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 2 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) As long as this creature is feral, it has doublestrike.

card.name: Ember Rune-Reader
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a tapped treasure token.

card.name: Ember-Rose Watcher
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: Burning Sentence
card.text: As additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. Burning Sentence deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell's additional cost was paid it deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker instead.

card.name: Valkor's Claim
card.text: Valkor's Claim deals double damage to permanents with mana value 3 or less. Valkor's Claim deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Raven's Incantation
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn." until end of turn. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Feral Invocation
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters this turn, it gains haste until end of turn. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Incantation of Autumn Sleep
card.text: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Ember Vigil
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a nonland permanent, exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled with Ember Vigil as long as one of your opponents lost life this turn.

card.name: Furious Smite
card.text: Furious Smite deals 3 damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures. Destroy up to one target artifact with mana value 3 or less. Discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: Ursine Goblin Rider
card.text: When Ursine Goblin Rider enters or dies, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Elyndor Street Thief
card.text: When Elyndor Street Thief dies, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. Blasphemy — {1}{R}: Create a tapped Treasure token. (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Cult Judge
card.text: Creatures you control have: "Blasphemy — {R}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn." (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Ember Incantation
card.text: Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast it until the end of turn. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Church Knight's Compass
card.text: Flash When Church Knight's Compass enters, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Cardshark Cultist
card.text: As additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or an artifact. Menace, haste.

card.name: Marksman's Instinct
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains reach until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Grimwoods Critter
card.text: Feral 2 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 2 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: Add two mana of any color. Activate only if this creature is feral.

card.name: Crosswood Sharpshooter
card.text: Reach When Crosswood Sharpshooter enters, up to two one target creature you control explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Rootwake Elemental
card.text: Reach, trample.

card.name: Traveling Treefolk
card.text: {3}{G}: Traveling Treefolk explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Roots Take Hold
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Incantation 2 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 2 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Earthen Chant
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. • Destroy target creature with flying.

card.name: Greenpath Explorer Squad
card.text: When Greenpath Explorer Squad enters, each creature you control explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Wayfinder Relic
card.text: Flash Mill four cards, then you may return a permanent card from among them to your hand. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hightrail Surveyor
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of your upkeep, Hightrail Surveyor explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Bone-Throwing Ooze
card.text: Reach When Bone-Throwing Ooze enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. Destroyed permanent's controller creates a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Underfolk Pathrunner
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Bloodtrail Hounds
card.text: Haste When Bloodtrail Hounds enters, create two Map tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Verdant Monarch
card.text: Feral 3 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 3 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) Vigilance, haste As long as this creature is feral, it has trample.

card.name: Khar-Duun Scrapscarab
card.text: Trample Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Khar-Duun Scrapscarab.

card.name: Blooming Smite
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Up to one target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. Exile up to three target cards in graveyards.

card.name: Challenge of the Depths
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, enchanted creature fights up to one target creature an opponent controls. Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Subterrane Skitterlizard
card.text: Trample Morbid — Whenever Subterrane Skitterlizard attacks, if a creature died this turn, double its power until end of turn.

card.name: Swamp-Prowler's Trail
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may play land cards from your graveyard and from the top of your library.

card.name: Rootforged Golem
card.text: Reach When Rootforged Golem enters, you gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Mycelial Dominion
card.text: Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}. {X}{G}: Enchanted land becomes a copy of target creature card in your graveyard with mana value X or less until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Wildheart Ascension
card.text: Double target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Boulderaxe Minotaur
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a creature spell, Boulderaxe Minotaur explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Underfolk Bonecaller
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Old God's Wisdom
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in random order. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Depths Entrance Warden
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever Depths Entrance Warden deals combat damage to a player, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard with mana value equal to or less then its power. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Crone's Offering
card.text: Exile any number of instant and sorcery cards from your graveyard with total mana value 3 or less. Until end of turn you may cast exiled cards without paying their mana costs. If those spells would be put into your graveyard, exile them instead. Exile Crone's Offering.

card.name: Cultforged Abomination
card.text: Menace Whenever Cultforged Abomination enters or attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, you lose 1 life and draw a card. Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Dungeon Overseer
card.text: As additional cost to cast this spell discard a card. When Dungeon Overseer dies, reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Triune Bladefall
card.text: Triune Bladefall deals 3 damage to each creature and each planeswalker. Look at X cards from the top of your library where X is the number of creatures that died this turn. Exile one of them, you may play it this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Elderwild Behemoth
card.text: Feral 3 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 3 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) Trample When this creature becomes feral, create two 3/3 green Beast creature tokens.

card.name: Rutili, Rotbound Expeditionist
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Map VTK
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery

card.name: Odile, Elyndor Princess
card.text: [+1]: Create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token. [-3]: Create a Cloister token.(A white enchantment with "When this enters, exile target nonland permanent until this leaves.") [-6]: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your end step, create two white 1/1 Human Knight creature tokens."

card.name: Abysswake Leviathan
card.text: Flash Whenever Abysswake Leviathan or another nontoken creature you control enters, create a Luminous Esca token attached to that creature.(A blue enchantment Aura with "Enchant creature" and "Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may draw a card.")

card.name: Crimson-Flame Summoner
card.text: Flying, haste, prowess Whenever Crimson-Flame Summoner attacks, create a 1/1 blue and red Elemental creature token with prowess, that is tapped and attacking.

card.name: Kingdom Breaker Hydra
card.text: Kingdom Breaker Hydra enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Trample Morbid — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if a creature died this turn, put a number of +1/+1 counters on each creature you control equal to Kingdom Breaker Hydra's power.

card.name: Old God's Cruelty
card.text: Counter target spell. You may cast a creature, instant, sorcery, or planeswalker spell from your graveyard with mana value less than or equal to that spell's mana value by paying life equal to it's mana value instead of paying its mana cost.

card.name: Rite of Blood and Flame
card.text: As additional cost to cast this spell you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. Choose two, if this card's additional cost was paid choose three instead: • Draw a card and lose 1 life. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact. • Rite of Blood and Flame deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature your opponents control.

card.name: Preparations for the Descent
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep create a Map token. If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Underworld Guide
card.text: Morbid — This creature enters with a +1/+1 and a trample counter on it if a creature died this turn. Whenever Underworld Guide deals combat damage to a player, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Bearer of Blessings
card.text: Vigilance, haste Valiant — Whenever Bearer of Blessings becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Bloomsting Assassin
card.text: Flash Reach Whenever Bloomsting Assassin deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, you may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Map of Carrion Grove
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. {T}, Sacrifice Map of Carrion Grove: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Guild Provisions
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {1}, {T}: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hunter's Lantern
card.text: {T}: Add {C} or mana of any color among cards exiled with Hunter's Lantern. {T}: Exile target card in a graveyard, until Hunter's Lantern leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Ordinary Scarecrow
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}: Put four +1/+1 counters on Ordinary Scarecrow. It becomes a 0/0 scarecrow creature in addition to its other types. Activate only once and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sturdy Bow
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has reach and "{T}, : This creature deals 1 damage to any target." Equip {1}

card.name: Mysterious Horseman
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever Mysterious Horseman attacks, exile target card from a graveyard and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Rat VTK
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Treasure VTK
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Clattercrew VTK
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create three 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. Then each creature you control explores.

card.name: Odile VTK
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create two white 1/1 Human Knight creature tokens.

card.name: Luminous High Priestess
card.text: Flash Flying. You may cast knight and sorcery spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Oath-Mender Paladin
card.text: Oath-Mender Paladin can't be countered. When Oath-Mender Paladin enters, create two 1/1 white Human Knight creature tokens. Whenever a Knight you control dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Idas, Ruined King
card.text: Flying, lifelink Sacrifice another creature: Reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value. Discard a card: Idas gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Lightforged Prayer
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature card with mana value 1 from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. • Copy target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard with mana value 1. You may cast the copy. Incantation 4 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 4 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Fallen Kingdom of the Moon
card.text: Fallen Kingdom of the Moon enters tapped unless you control a basic land. {T}: Add {B}. {3}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice Fallen Kingdom of the Moon: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a sorcery card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Fallen Kingdom of the Ancients
card.text: Fallen Kingdom of the Ancients enters tapped unless you control a basic land. {T}: Add {G}. {3}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice Fallen Kingdom of the Ancients: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Fallen Kingdom of the Flame
card.text: Fallen Kingdom of the Flame enters tapped unless you control a basic land. {T}: Add {R}. {3}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice Fallen Kingdom of the Flame: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Fallen Kingdom of the Sun
card.text: Fallen Kingdom of the Sun enters tapped unless you control a basic land. {T}: Add {W}. {3}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice Fallen Kingdom of the Sun: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an enchantment card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Fallen Kingdom of the Tides
card.text: Fallen Kingdom of the Tides enters tapped unless you control a basic land. {T}: Add {U}. {3}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Fallen Kingdom of the Tides: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Marble Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Marble Ruins: Search your library for a basic Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Overgrown Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Overgrown Ruins: Search your library for a basic Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Sanctified Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Sanctified Ruins: Search your library for a basic Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Crackling Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Crackling Ruins: Search your library for a basic Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Ashen Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Ashen Ruins: Search your library for a basic Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Cursed Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Cursed Ruins: Search your library for a basic Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Underground Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Underground Ruins: Search your library for a basic Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Echoing Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Echoing Ruins: Search your library for a basic Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Titanic Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Titanic Ruins: Search your library for a basic Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Sunscorched Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Sunscorched Ruins: Search your library for a basic Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Breach from the Depths
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Rhyme of Unmaking
card.text: Surveil 3. Draw two cards. You lose 1 life. (To surveil 3, look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Morbid Collector
card.text: Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Surveil 1 Blasphemy — {B}{R}: Return target creature or artifact card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery, (When you activate a blasphemy ability of a permanent, sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of your endstep. Activate each blasphemy ability only once.)

card.name: Moss-Made Paladin
card.text: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on another permanent you control, if it's the first time +1/+1 counters have been put on that permanent this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Moss-Made Paladin. When Moss-Made Paladin dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Black Reliquary Banshee
card.text: Flying Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, target opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent of their choice or discard a card.

card.name: Expressive Iteration
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand, put one of them on the bottom of your library, and exile one of them. You may play the exiled card this turn.

card.name: Rotbound Enforcer
card.text: Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, you gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Paladin's Resolve
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 white Human Knight creature tokens. • Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Daring Dungeon Raider
card.text: Haste Whenever Daring Dungeon Raider attacks, create a Map token. Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Orva, Cauldron Rider
card.text: If an instant or sorcery card would be put into your graveyard from your hand or library, exile it instead and put a hex counter on it. [+1]: Draw two cards, then discard a card. [-2]: You may cast a copy of an instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from among cards in exile with hex counters on them.

card.name: Catacomb Warden
card.text: Trample When Catacomb Warden dies, target land you control becomes a Swamp in addition to its other types and gains: "{3}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target card named Catacomb Warden from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped."

card.name: Dungeon Architect
card.text: Menace, haste When Dungeon Architect enters, Search your library for an artifact card with mana value X and exile it. Whenever Dungeon Architect deals combat damage to a player, create a token copy of the exiled artifact.

card.name: Ember Smite
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Ember Smite deals X damage to any target, this damage can't be prevented.

card.name: Eternal Hunter
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Saint Gwen's Blessing
card.text: Return up to one target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if you've spent no mana to cast spells this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Incantation 5 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Autumn Witch
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may cast instant and sorcery cards from the top of your library. {U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: False New God
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, you may cast a copy of one of those cards. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Coven's Offering
card.text: Choose up to five target cards in your graveyard. Target opponent separates them into two piles. Put a pile of your choice into your hand. Exile Coven's Offering.

card.name: Refined Taste
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a hunger counter on Refined Taste then mill cards equal to the number of hunger counters on it. You may return a card milled this way to your hand, by paying life equal to the number of hunger counters on Refined Taste.

card.name: Monster Tracker's Song
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Each creature put onto the battlefield this way explores and gains haste until end of turn. Incantation 3 (if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Khar-Duun Dragon Breeder
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a 0/1green Egg creature token with "When this creature dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order." {1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Sanctwhale of Prayer
card.text: Flying When Sanctwhale of Prayer enters, if it entered from a graveyard, transform it. {3}{W}: Transform Sanctwhale of Prayer. --- (Back): Reborn Sanctwhale

card.name: Reborn Sanctwhale
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Reborn Sanctwhale attacks, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token. --- (Front): Sanctwhale of Prayer

card.name: Egg VTK
card.text: When this creature dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Albino Dreadkite
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Albino Dreadkite attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may have Albino Dreadkite deal 3 damage to any non player target. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.

card.name: Althea, Hope of Khar-Duun
card.text: Althea has First strike as long as she is attacking. Whenever Althea attacks, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token that is tapped and attacking.

card.name: Gore Omadi, Daughter of Ash
card.text: Whenever Gore Omadi enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, draw a card. Whenever another creature or artifact you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Tala, New Goddess of Beasts
card.text: Vigilance, trample Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

card.name: Eclipsed Tormentor
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life When Eclipsed Tormentor enters, target opponent creates a red enchantment token named Agony with: "You can't gain life. Whenever you cast a spell, Agony deals 1 damage to you for each spell you've cast this turn.".

card.name: Agony VTK
card.text: You can't gain life. Whenever you cast a spell, Agony deals 1 damage to you for each spell you've cast this turn.

card.name: Rotbound Awakener
card.text: Menace {3}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand

card.name: Broken Benediction
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent with mana value 3 or less. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, destroy up to 4 target nonland permanents with total mana value 3 or less instead.

card.name: Wish Granting Priest
card.text: Flash Flying When Wish Granting Priest enters, if you cast it, you may play an instant or sorcery card you own from outside the game this turn.

card.name: Everywhere VTK
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest.

card.name: Flamecasting Fury
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. You may create a 1/1 blue and red Elemental creature token with prowess. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.

card.name: Old One's Tomb
card.text: Old One's Tomb enters the battlefield tapped with 10 slumber counters and a stun counter. {T}: Add {C}{C}. Old One's Tomb deals 2 damage to you. Whenever a creature dies, remove a slumber counter from Old One's Tomb. Then if it has no counters on it, it becomes a 7/7 black God Horror creature with menace and "Whenever this attacks each opponent losses 7 life".

card.name: Soulstone Dominion
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {6}: This land becomes a 5/5 creature with vigilance and all creature types, it gains: "Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card, then draw a card. ". It's still a land.

card.name: Mysterious Challenger
card.text: When Mysterious Challenger enters, search your library for an artifact card reveal it, put it into your hand. Shuffle. If that card is an equipment, you may put it onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Elyndor Falls to the Curse
card.text: Time loop(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.) I — You mill three cards. II — Return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand. III — You gain 2 life.

card.name: Veteran Battle Cleric
card.text: Flying At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then if that creature has power 4 or greater create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

card.name: Endless War
card.text: The first time you attack each turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Hunter's Lullaby
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped and another card into your hand. If you did not put a land onto the battlefield this way, you may put two cards in your hand instead. Shuffle.

card.name: Aelun, New God of Prosperity
card.text: Flash Whenever Aelun enters or attacks and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may draw a card. Then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Luminous Esca VTK
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to an opponent, you may draw a card.

card.name: Bird VTK
card.text: Flying

card.name: Hollowfang Weaver
card.text: Feral 2 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 2 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) Reach, deathtouch At the beginning of your end step, if this creature is feral put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Forest Protector
card.text: Feral 3 (At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 3 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.) At the beginning of your end step for each counter on Forest Protector you may exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled this way until end of your next turn.
